rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.1581 governs reporting by out-of-state political committees. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: For each reporting period under this subchapter in which an out-of-state political committee accepts political contributions or makes political expenditures, the committee shall file with the commission a copy of one or more reports filed with the Federal Election Commission
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
